SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.ui

Interface RichTextPane

All Known Subinterfaces:
RichTextEditorPane
All Known Implementing Classes:
TextEditorPane, TextEditorPane, TextPane, TextPane
public interface RichTextPane
Toolkit-agnostic API for rich-text panes.

Implemented by UI toolkit specific controls (for example JavaFX and Swing).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getDisplayScale()
    Returns the current display scale used for preview rendering.
    Consumer<URI>
    getHyperlinkHandler()
    Returns the hyperlink handler used for inline hyperlinks.
    RichText
    getText()
    Returns the current rich text.
    Font
    getTextFont()
    Returns the rendering font.
    boolean
    isWrapText()
    Returns whether line wrapping is enabled.
    void
    setDisplayScale(double value)
    Sets the display scale used for preview rendering.
    void
    setHyperlinkHandler(Consumer<URI> handler)
    Sets the hyperlink handler used for inline hyperlinks.
    void
    setText(@Nullable CharSequence value)
    Sets text content.
    void
    setTextFont(Font value)
    Sets the rendering font.
    void
    setWrapText(boolean value)
    Enables or disables line wrapping.

  • Method Details

    • getText

      RichText getText()
      Returns the current rich text.
      Returns:
      current text

    • setText

      void setText(@Nullable CharSequence value)
      Sets text content.
      Parameters:
      value - text or null for empty text

    • isWrapText

      boolean isWrapText()
      Returns whether line wrapping is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if wrapping is enabled

    • setWrapText

      void setWrapText(boolean value)
      Enables or disables line wrapping.
      Parameters:
      value - true to enable wrapping

    • getTextFont

      Font getTextFont()
      Returns the rendering font.
      Returns:
      current font

    • setTextFont

      void setTextFont(Font value)
      Sets the rendering font.
      Parameters:
      value - font

    • getHyperlinkHandler

      Consumer<URI> getHyperlinkHandler()
      Returns the hyperlink handler used for inline hyperlinks.
      Returns:
      hyperlink handler

    • setHyperlinkHandler

      void setHyperlinkHandler(Consumer<URI> handler)
      Sets the hyperlink handler used for inline hyperlinks.
      Parameters:
      handler - hyperlink handler

    • getDisplayScale

      double getDisplayScale()
      Returns the current display scale used for preview rendering.
      Returns:
      display scale

    • setDisplayScale

      void setDisplayScale(double value)
      Sets the display scale used for preview rendering.
      Parameters:
      value - display scale (> 0)
